ValidationRule.description: The case cannot be closed (L2 Closed) if the Investigation Result (L2) is not populated after the case has been escalated to L2.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(Status, 'L2 Closed') && ISBLANK( Investigation_Result_L2__c) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Case_Sub_Type__c, 'Service Complaints'))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The case cannot be closed (L2 Closed) if the Investigation Result (L2) is not populated after the case has been escalated to L2.
